Package index

All functions

ContrastsSAINTFacade
SAINTexpress contrast analysis facade
ContrastsSAINTexpress
Wrapper to results produced by SAINTexpress
apparams_Bfabric()
get apparams from bfabric executable
copy_SAINT_express()
copy Markdown and runscript for DIANN diann-output.tsv
dataset_set_factors_deprecated()
set factors and sample names columns
get_files_DIANN()
find DIANN files
get_params_Bfabric()
get params from bfabric executable
normalize_exp()
normalize and then exponentiate data.
read_DIANN_output()
DIANN helper functions
add_protein_lengths() protein_2localSaint() runSaint()
Add protein lengths from fasta file to data frame (id_col - protein id column.)
transform_force()
force data transformation

Developed by Witold Wolski.
